description: anima-local roadmap lint — extends hexa-lang/tool/roadmap_lint.hexa with anima-specific checks (feeds-main phase mapping, done-proof ≥10 chars OR verify CPID, reaches/depends-on resolution). Primary linter at /Users/ghost/core/hexa-lang/tool/roadmap_lint.hexa — this tool runs AFTER the base linter and adds anima extensions. See roadmap #33 (data cluster) + #34 (ops cluster) for lint tooling context.
notes: done=proof≥10chars OR verify <CPID> (both optional simultaneously ok).
feeds-main values must match a declared checkpoint id whose phase matches the referenced P* label (e.g. feeds-main P1 → a checkpoint with phase key P1).
reaches <CPID> must resolve to a declared checkpoint block.
depends-on <id> numeric-first-token must resolve to an existing roadmap id. Cross-repo refs (e.g. hexa-lang@33) are skipped.
state output shape: {errors:[], warnings:[], pass:bool, ts:<iso>, entries:<n>, checkpoints:<n>}
